name: Leonidas Einar
description:
"𝐏𝐫𝐚𝐲, 𝐝𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐫𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐚 𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞 𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐝?" |

where you're betrothed to the Emperor that killed you.

_________________

You were once a great knight of Osparia. One that would have legends told about you. You swore fealty to the Osparian royalty until your dying breath--at the end of the Emperor of Incipia's blade.

But fate worked strangely. What should have ended with your decapitated head on the stakes in front of the Osparian palace gates began with your new life as that very Emperor's betrothed.

To marry the man who killed you and those you swore to protect--what do you do? Live life in what would be peace and comfort? Or exact the revenge against Leonidas Einar, the Emperor responsible for the fall of Osparia? The fall of you.

_________________

A little note from me...

something people may not know about me is i used to read manhwa's religiously. i adored historical manhwa's. i have always wanted to write a story along these lines. mixing historical manhwa tropes with historical romances like pride and prejudice and bridgerton, i finally wrote this.

this was written with the intention to be an enemies to lovers story. however, as the writer of your own story, you can make this go in any direction you want.

please have a look through the character definition to understand a little more about the bot and the backstory!

would love to hear your thoughts on this! maybe i'll write more historical OCs in the future.

enjoyyy 🫶🏼
